__fixture__.name: compatibility_proof_deferred_known_limit_route
__fixture__.scenario: Compatibility report re-run could not land in the train. The compat row narrows, the claim posture moves to limited, and the migration-notes and support-export surfaces render the known-limit route while the compat owner re-runs the report. The packet's reversal class is withdraw_claim_and_route_to_known_limit.

rationale: The compatibility report re-run for the desktop platform-conformance profiles slipped the rc2 train because a qualification host needed a reimage. The compat row narrows and the migration-notes / support-export surfaces render the known-limit route until the signed report is posted. If the rerun slips past expiry, the claim is withdrawn and the surface continues to render the known-limit route.

impacted_claim_rows.narrowing_note: Boundary claim narrows to limited while the compatibility report is pending; known-limit route disclosed on migration notes and support export.

impacted_compat_rows.narrowing_note: Compat row supports-window language narrows until the rerun lands. Known-limit note covers the missing qualification host.

degraded_wording_surfaces.degraded_text_preview: Migration note points at the known-limit route until the rerun signs.
Support export header lists the narrowed compat window and the known-limit route.
Release notes list the compat claim as limited this train; signed rerun publishes after rc2.

support_impact.narrative: Support handoff for the missing qualification host is narrowed to the known-limit route for the rc2 train. Operators who request the wider path are routed to the known-limit note until the rerun signs.

required_reviewers.notes: Narrowed wording matches the compat row's current effective posture; no widening.
Accepted for rc2; expiry set inside the reimage-and-rerun window.
Rerun scheduled; signed report publishes before expiry or the claim withdraws.
Handoff narrowing acknowledged; support macros route to the known-limit note.

rollback_or_reversal.notes: If the rerun slips past expiry, the claim withdraws permanently and the known-limit route remains on migration notes / support export until a later train lands the proof. Silent restoration of the wider wording is forbidden.

notes: The migration-notes and support-export surfaces MUST continue to render the known-limit route until the reversal resolves; silent restoration is forbidden.
